headline: The next frontier is defined, but no aligned implementation task is open yet: Define the v7.5 Requirements Coverage slice: maintain requirement records, map work items to functional/non-functional/QIF gates, compute coverage and task completion, surface blockers and risks, and expose forecast/burndown data in Mission Control as bounded planning evidence.

current_state.operating_goal: After v7.4.0, advance v7.5 Requirements Coverage, Forecasting, And Organization Analytics: prove that AOF can extract requirements, link tasks and evidence to requirements, show coverage/completion/blocked risk, and produce bounded completion and token-cost forecasts without claiming semantic satisfaction.
current_state.next_value_slice: Define the v7.5 Requirements Coverage slice: maintain requirement records, map work items to functional/non-functional/QIF gates, compute coverage and task completion, surface blockers and risks, and expose forecast/burndown data in Mission Control as bounded planning evidence.
